dimensions.criterion: Exactly one playbook loaded; topic in the 8-enum; deferred topic named if two were plausible.
Output applies the playbook to the user's real collections/fields, not the topic in the abstract.
Loads are idempotent (upsert on key or stage-then-swap); re-run is byte-identical.
Watermark advanced only post-commit; kill-mid-batch resumes zero-gap, zero-duplication.
No Firestore write batch exceeds 500 ops; bulk writes chunked with batch_id.
Every destructive op carries a rollback path stated before execution.
Source vs target counts + key checksum match within tolerance; no duplicate/NULL keys at grain.
Every claim carries one Alfa-core family tag; one family, one spelling.
